title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni, 15 others convicted for murder of BJP leader Yogesh Gowda
description: A special court in Bengaluru on Wednesday convicted Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni and 15 others in the 2016 murder case of BJP leader Yogesh Gowda from Dharwad.The judgment was delivered by special court judge Santosh Gajanan Bhat.Yogesh Gowda, a BJP leader and former member of the Dharwad Zila Panchayat, was brutally killed at his gym in Dharwad on June 15, 2016. Following the murder, a first information report (FIR) was registered at the Dharwad Suburban Police Station. The CBI investigated the
